title: duggena tomentosa
intro: Duggena tomentosa, commonly known as "Yerba de los Muertos," is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, due to its impressive array of health benefits. The plant's therapeutic actions include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which help in reducing pain, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. The bioactive constituents of Duggena tomentosa include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
